examples: The motion should push sufferers of sleep apnoea—the loud form of snoring that can be dangerous to health—into a position where they no longer snore.
Obstructive sleep apnoea affects up to 4% of the population, but the majority of cases are undiagnosed.
Among the conditions examined by the St Thomas' team were obstructive sleep apnoea (OSA) and restless leg syndrome (RLS).
